channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Harry Brook warns India despite them being favourites in T20 World Cup semi-final
item.description: England captain Harry Brook has acknowledged that India are the favourites to win the T20 World Cup on home soil, but he reminded everyone that T20 cricket is unpredictable and anything can happen. Th...

item.title: Pakistan Navy seizes over 2,000 kg of methamphetamine in Arabian Sea operation
item.description: The Pakistan Navy has made a significant interception in its ongoing counter-narcotics efforts, confiscating methamphetamine (ICE) valued at around $130 million during an operation in the Arabian Sea....

item.title: Canadian Authorities Reveal Evidence Linking Indian Consular Staff to Nijjar's Assassination
item.description: Recent revelations from The Globe and Mail show that Canadian authorities have gathered evidence connecting Indian consular staff to the killing of Hardeep Singh Nijjar, a Sikh activist, in Surrey, B....

item.title: n8n: Open-Source Workflow Automation Platform with AI and 400+ Integrations
item.description: n8n is a versatile workflow automation platform designed for technical teams that need both flexibility and speed. Combining a visual interface with the option to write custom JavaScript or Python cod...

item.title: Financing Climate Resilience: The Need for Adaptation Beyond Disaster Relief
item.description: South Africa is facing increasing climate-related disasters, from floods and droughts to wildfires. In his 2026 State of the Nation Address, President Cyril Ramaphosa highlighted the devastating toll ...

item.title: Employers warn against five weeks of annual leave due to inflation risks
item.description: Employers and economists are pushing back against the union movement’s call for a mandatory five weeks of annual leave. The Australian Council of Trade Unions (ACTU) is advocating for the change as pa...

item.title: Sowunmi Debunks Claims That Five Governors Determined Tinubu’s Victory
item.description: Otunba Segun Sowunmi, PDP chieftain and convener of The Alternative, don talk say e no believe say Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, fit dey truthful about the role of the so-called G-5 governors for ...

item.title: The Impact of the Closure of the Strait of Hormuz on Global Oil Prices and the Economy
item.description: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz, triggered by a joint US-Israel attack on Iran, is disrupting global oil markets and triggering price increases worldwide. This crucial waterway, located between Ir...

item.title: Middle East tensions challenge UK economic forecasts and government plans
item.description: The recent conflict in the Middle East has thrown the United Kingdom's economic outlook into uncertainty, rendering official forecasts by the Office for Budget Responsibility (OBR) potentially outdate...

item.title: Philosophical Exploration of Happiness: More Than Just Joy and Pleasure
item.description: The article delves into the complex nature of happiness and how it is often defined in various contexts. It explores the mainstream view of happiness, which is largely influenced by consumerism, capit...

item.title: Tanzanian Universities Encouraged to Publish Local Academic Textbooks
item.description: The government of Tanzania has directed local universities to produce their own academic textbooks, noting that heavy reliance on foreign materials is weakening education in specialised fields. During...

item.title: Former Heart Patient Returns to Tenwek as Nurse to Support Others
item.description: Maureen Cherotich, diagnosed with rheumatic heart disease at the age of nine in 2009, underwent two open-heart surgeries – the first in 2009 and the second in 2017 when she was 16. Today, at 24, she h...

item.title: Actress Omo Local Opens Up About Infidelity and Divorce
item.description: Actress Victoria Akanke Ajibola, popularly known as Omo Local, has shared the heartbreaking story of how she discovered her best friend was having an affair with her husband. In an emotional interview...

item.title: Victoria Beckham publicly wishes son Brooklyn a happy 27th birthday amid family tensions
item.description: Victoria Beckham has publicly wished her eldest son, Brooklyn Peltz Beckham, a happy 27th birthday on Instagram, despite ongoing tensions within the family. Sharing two nostalgic images, including a b...

item.title: Renault unveils Bridger Concept: a compact SUV for city families
item.description: Renault has announced its latest concept vehicle, the Bridger Concept, aimed at families living in urban areas. The Bridger Concept previews a forthcoming compact SUV that will compete in the small SU...

item.title: PDEA 9 Destroys Over 11,000 Marijuana Plants in Sulu
item.description: On March 3, 2026, the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency Region 9 (PDEA 9) conducted a major anti-narcotics operation in Barangay Masjid Punjungan, Kalingalan Caluang, Sulu, leading to the uprooting a...

item.title: Iranian Warship Iris Dena Sinks off Sri Lanka; Rescue Efforts Underway
item.description: An Iranian frigate, the Iris Dena, has sunk off the coast of Sri Lanka in what is suspected to be a submarine attack. Reports indicate that at least one person has died and dozens have been injured, w...

item.title: Privatisation Commission Approves Fauji Fertiliser's Role in PIA Consortium
item.description: The Privatisation Commission of Pakistan has approved Fauji Fertiliser Company’s (FFC) inclusion in the consortium led by Arif Habib, which had won the bid for a 75% stake in Pakistan International Ai...

item.title: How to Make Your Rice Healthier with Multigrain Mix
item.description: If you sabi love rice well-well but wan make am more nutritious, dis multigrain rice mix go fit you. Instead of eating just white rice, you fit mix am with quinoa and lentils. Dis combination dey give...

item.title: Reeves delivers low-key spring statement amid economic pressures and political sparring
item.description: Rachel Reeves delivered a notably brief and fiscally uneventful spring statement, insisting that the government’s economic plan remained sound despite worsening indicators. Official figures showing fa...
